texto: I don’t want to be the product of my environment, of the perks of this generation. I want to see the bigger picture, take it into account and make the choices that go beyond what’s right in front of me.I want to be timeless.
explicacao: Citação de Selin Kuscu sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I don’t want to be the product of my environment, of the perks of this generation. I want to see …” articula reflexao, quote, product em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
